checklist: boot the ROM and start a fresh save file
reach an early controllable state without hang or corruption
confirm the game is in a plausible early mode and submode state
confirm visible HUD and world state are sane for a fresh file
confirm no obviously incorrect dungeon, room-flag, or macro-progression state is visible
